Homebrew Formulae

phpantom-lsp

Install command:

Fast PHP language server written in Rust

https://github.com/AJenbo/phpantom_lsp

License: MIT

Development: Pull requests

Formula JSON API: /api/formula/phpantom-lsp.json

Formula code: phpantom-lsp.rb on GitHub

Bottle (binary package) installation support provided for:

macOS on
Apple Silicon		 tahoe ✅
sequoia ✅
sonoma ✅
macOS on
Intel		 sonoma ✅
Linux ARM64 ✅
x86_64 ✅

Current versions:

stable ✅ 0.8.0

Depends on when building from source:

rust 1.96.0 Safe, concurrent, practical language
